# Community and Support

Rez2ANS Next is developed for the BBS, ANSI, textmode, and retro-computing communities.

## Instant Demise Support Discord

[Join the Instant Demise Discord](https://discord.gg/bemze78N7f)

The server is the best place for installation help, conversion questions, bug reports, feature ideas, BBS integration discussion, CP437 and ANSI talk, sample profiles, Windows/Linux testing, and sharing source images or results.

## Reporting a problem

Please include as much of the following as you can:

- operating system and Rez2ANS Next version
- GPU and graphics-driver version when Vulkan is involved
- source-image dimensions and format
- chosen output dimensions and conversion mode
- profile or settings used
- screenshot or exported result
- clear steps that reproduce the problem

## Contact

The creator and maintainer is **Dennis Martin — Sudden Death**. Discord: `SuddenDeath8181`.

Use the community server for normal support whenever possible; it lets answers and examples benefit other users. Direct messages are best reserved for private matters.
